title: My body knows how to sleep
subtitle: A short affirmation for building trust in the body's natural capacity to rest.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 17 of the SLEEP program. Two statements for replacing the habit of trying to manage or direct sleep with a simple trust in the body's own process.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 17 of SLEEP: A 30-Day Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 17 of the SLEEP program. Two statements, said in sequence, for anchoring the shift from managing sleep to trusting it.
My body knows how to sleep.
I trust it to find its way.
Say each statement three times in the evening, with a pause between them. They are not joined into one sentence: the pause gives each one room to land. Hand on chest if useful.
Adapted from Day 17 of SLEEP: A 30-Day Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
